name: loopkit
description: Spec-driven loop engineering for Claude Code — the proportional loop where planning ceremony scales with change size, with all work state on GitHub issues/milestones/board, attended and subscription-auth.

plugins.name: loopkit
plugins.description: The proportional loop for Claude Code: ceremony scales with change size — full spec -> milestone -> dependency-ordered issues for features, a track:adhoc fast-lane for bugs/QoL, a living-spec track for ongoing themes. /inception bootstraps loop-readiness; /roadmap spars raw ideas into seeded roadmap phases; /plan produces, /implement orchestrates one milestone via in-session subagent fan-out, /design adds an optional planning-time design step (UI or a decision-clarifying concept/flow visualisation); /ship finalizes merged work into a published release — all on GitHub issues/milestones/board, attended and subscription-auth.
